lectures.title: Local Features (Lectures 1-2)
lectures.topics: Wide-baseline correspondences, Harris corners, Hessian/DoG, scale selection via Laplacian, affine invariance, orientation estimation, MSER, FAST detector, SIFT/RootSIFT descriptors, LBP-like descriptors, descriptor matching, ratio test, learning local feature detectors, R2D2/SuperPoint.

lectures.title: RANSAC
lectures.topics: RANSAC algorithm, robust estimation, sample size, number of iterations, inlier/outlier, MSAC/PROSAC variants, parameters, advantages and disadvantages, comparison with Hough.

lectures.title: Image Retrieval
lectures.topics: Bag-of-Words histogram, codebook, idf weighting, inverted file, image-to-image similarity, VLAD descriptor, SMK (Selective Match Kernel), spatial verification, query expansion, retrieval + RANSAC zoom-in, mAP, precision@k, recall@k, sparsity.

lectures.title: Deep Learning Part 1
lectures.topics: CNN structure (convolutional, pooling, fully connected layers), non-linearities, image classification, SGD, learning rate selection, dropout, batch normalization, cost functions, Transformers, applications of CNNs in computer vision.

lectures.title: Deep Learning Part 2
lectures.topics: Object detection with deep nets, proposal-based detectors, end-to-end detectors, bounding box prediction, class prediction, segmentation, foundation models.

lectures.title: Deep Learned Local Features
lectures.topics: SuperPoint, SuperGlue, RoMa, DUSt3R, learned matching pipelines.

lectures.title: Deep Metric Learning
lectures.topics: Global image descriptors via CNNs, SPoC/MAC/GeM pooling, translation invariance, contrastive loss, triplet loss, margin, hard negatives, differentiable recall@k loss, NetVLAD, mapping images to vector space for retrieval.

lectures.title: Self-Supervised Learning
lectures.topics: Auto-encoders, contrastive self-supervised methods, SimCLR, role of positive and negative pairs.

lectures.title: KLT Tracking
lectures.topics: Kanade-Lucas-Tomasi tracker, gradient-based tracking, which image patches are suitable for tracking, aperture problem.

lectures.title: KCF Tracking (Kernel Correlation Filter / DCT)
lectures.topics: Discriminative correlation tracking (DCT), KCF, kernel correlation filter, scale and rotation handling, search method, object representation, long-term tracking, mean-shift tracking, color-space reduction.

lectures.title: Tracking-Learning-Detection (TLD)
lectures.topics: TLD framework, P-N learning, online detector updates, scanning window detection, integral image, ensemble classifier, NN classifier.
